name: Oatmeal Pie/woman's Circle
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Deborah Epstein (NAFY67C@prodigy.com)
1. Cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Stir in cinnamon and salt.
3. Add syrup and honey, then beat in eggs one at a time.
4. Fold in oats to combine.
5. Pour mixture into prepared pie shell.
6. Bake at 350°F for about an hour, or until center is set.
During baking, the oatmeal rises and forms a chewy, nutty crust on top of the pie. This recipe yields a mock pecan pie with a similar texture and flavor but without the high cost of actual pecans.
